criteria.name: novelty

failure_points.description: Phrase 'zombies from the neck down' is slightly glib for formal-analytical register

criteria.explanation: Original thesis flipping the zombie argument is genuinely novel. Minor tone issue.

criteria.name: clarity

failure_points.description: Global broadcasting introduced too briefly for the argumentative weight it carries
Three-part reply structure announced but relationship between the three grounds is not explained

criteria.explanation: Generally clear but key concept (global broadcasting) underdeveloped.

criteria.name: structure

failure_points.description: Hard problem counter-reply handles objection and response in one compressed section

criteria.explanation: Strong thesis-forward structure. Roadmap matches actual organization.

criteria.name: voice_preservation

failure_points.description: Casual register break with 'neck up as well'
Triumphalist closing tone breaks analytical register

criteria.explanation: Two moments of casual/rhetorical tone break formal-analytical consistency.

criteria.name: audience_fit

failure_points.description: Global workspace theory assumes cognitive science background

criteria.explanation: Good examples but some technical terms insufficiently explained for undergrad audience.

criteria.name: concision

failure_points.description: List of unconscious processes is somewhat redundant after earlier examples

criteria.explanation: Good word economy at ~1800 words. No padding paragraphs.

criteria.name: factual_integrity

failure_points.description: Libet-style claim stated as established fact despite being contested

criteria.explanation: No fabricated citations. Claims grounded in class materials.
